title: Subtraction Picnic
description: A friendly take-away picnic game where kids feed guests and count the snacks that remain.
learningGoals: Count remaining snacks after a change
Reason about how many are left within 6
interactionModel: tap shared food cards to feed a hungry guest, then count the remaining cards
feedbackModel: Each fed snack speaks the count; the tap-count engine asks how many are left and counts the remainder aloud.
credits: Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
